name: BioPhi
description: Evaluate antibody humanness using peptide search in natural antibody repertoires (OASis) and germline sequence identity. Humanize your H/L sequences using a language model trained on OAS.
capabilities: Evaluate antibody humanness using peptide search in natural antibody repertoires (OASis) and germline sequence identity
Humanize your H/L sequences using a language model trained on OAS

heavy_chain.description: Antibody heavy chain amino acid sequence

light_chain.description: Antibody light chain amino acid sequence

humanize.description: Enable Sapiens humanization of the input antibody sequences

scheme.description: Antibody numbering scheme for CDR identification
